sessions.summary: Shipped bot supervision after a 3rd silent network-drop death. WS-B #124 added an in-process reconnect watchdog; its first version false-killed a healthy idle bot (keyed off event-silence, which conflates dead with idle). #125 redesigned it to a connection-state gate (arm only while reconnecting, clear on connected) and fixed an architect-caught wiring-order blind window. Bot now runs under pm2 + pm2-windows-startup (three-layer supervision: watchdog=stuck socket, pm2=process death, startup=reboot). 511 tests. Also shipped earlier same block: D2 #121 truncation-safety + D1 #122 See-see (already logged 2026-07-12).
done: PM re-ranked supervision over #123 after the outage
#124 watchdog shipped, then false-killed idle bot
#125 connection-state gate redesign, 3-gate incl adversarial architect re-review
Fixed wiring-order blind window (register before start())
Installed pm2 + pm2-windows-startup, bot supervised + reboot-persistent
Verified pm2 auto-restarted bot twice (self-heal proven)
